description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named windows-x64-Release that triggers on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Run a build job on a windows-2019 environment with a customized vcpkg setup, checking out the repository with submodules, installing vcpkg, setting up NuGet credentials, creating a build environment, configuring CMake, and uploading the cmake configure log artifact on failure. Then build the project using CMake.
